<noinclude>
Usage:
<pre>
{{Card
| name      = Ratchanter
| type      = Minion
| element   = Dark
| tribe     = Rat
| cost      = 4
| attack    = 15
| hp        = 30
| range     = 0
| rules     = Activated: pay 2 mana to conjure a Common Rat and buff it.
| flavor    = The rats listen, and the rats remember.
| keywords  = Sacrifice, Summon
| art       = Ratchanter.png
| patch     = 0.4.2
| stable_id = ratchanter
| deckable  = true
}}
</pre>

This template renders a card infobox AND emits SMW property annotations in a
single pass. Phase 1 sample only — Phase 3 sync_cards.py will drive it from
data/cards/*.json automatically.
</noinclude><includeonly>{| class="gt-card gt-element-{{lc:{{{element|}}}}}" style="float:right; width:280px; border:2px solid #222; border-radius:10px; background:#1a1a1a; color:#eee; font-family:sans-serif; margin:0 0 1em 1em;"
|-
! colspan="2" style="padding:6px 10px; background:linear-gradient(90deg,#333,#111); border-radius:8px 8px 0 0; text-align:center; position:relative;" | <span style="position:absolute; left:10px; top:50%; transform:translateY(-50%); background:{{#switch:{{lc:{{{element|}}}}}|wood=rgb(102,187,106)|fire=rgb(220,40,30)|earth=rgb(140,100,40)|water=rgb(66,165,245)|metal=rgb(189,189,189)|dark=rgb(130,50,180)|light=rgb(240,220,40)|#default=rgb(128,128,128)}}; border-radius:50%; width:28px; height:28px; display:inline-block; text-align:center; line-height:28px; font-weight:bold;">{{{cost|?}}}</span> <span style="font-size:1.2em; font-weight:bold;">{{{name|{{PAGENAME}}}}}</span> <span style="position:absolute; right:10px; top:50%; transform:translateY(-50%); background:{{#switch:{{lc:{{{element|}}}}}|wood=rgb(102,187,106)|fire=rgb(220,40,30)|earth=rgb(140,100,40)|water=rgb(66,165,245)|metal=rgb(189,189,189)|dark=rgb(130,50,180)|light=rgb(240,220,40)|#default=rgb(128,128,128)}}; border-radius:50%; width:28px; height:28px; display:inline-block; text-align:center; line-height:28px; font-weight:bold; font-size:0.7em;">{{{element|?}}}</span>
|-
| colspan="2" style="padding:0;" | [[File:{{{art|CardBack.png}}}|280px|center|link=]]
|-
| colspan="2" style="padding:4px 10px; font-style:italic; border-top:1px solid #444; border-bottom:1px solid #444; background:#222;" | {{{type|Minion}}} &mdash; {{{element|Neutral}}}{{#if:{{{tribe|}}}| &middot; {{{tribe}}}}}{{#if:{{{keywords|}}}| &middot; {{{keywords}}}}}
|-
| colspan="2" style="padding:8px 10px; min-height:60px;" | {{{rules|}}}{{#if:{{{flavor|}}}|<hr style="border:0;border-top:1px dashed #555;"/><span style="color:#888;font-style:italic;">{{{flavor}}}</span>}}
|-
{{#if:{{{attack|}}}|
! style="padding:6px 10px; background:#111; border-radius:0 0 0 8px; text-align:left;" {{!}} {{{attack}}}🗡️
! style="padding:6px 10px; background:#111; border-radius:0 0 8px 0; text-align:right;" {{!}} {{{hp}}}🤍
}}
|}

{{#set:Name={{{name|{{PAGENAME}}}}} }}{{#if:{{{stable_id|}}}|{{#set:StableId={{{stable_id}}} }}}}{{#if:{{{type|}}}|{{#set:CardType={{{type}}} }}}}{{#if:{{{element|}}}|{{#set:Element={{{element}}} }}}}{{#if:{{{tribe|}}}|{{#set:Tribe={{{tribe}}} }}}}{{#if:{{{cost|}}}|{{#set:Cost={{{cost}}} }}}}{{#if:{{{attack|}}}|{{#set:Attack={{{attack}}} }}}}{{#if:{{{hp|}}}|{{#set:HP={{{hp}}} }}}}{{#if:{{{range|}}}|{{#set:Range={{{range}}} }}}}{{#if:{{{art|}}}|{{#set:ArtFile=File:{{{art}}} }}}}{{#if:{{{patch|}}}|{{#set:FirstPatch={{{patch}}} }}}}{{#if:{{{last_changed_patch|}}}|{{#set:LastChangedPatch={{{last_changed_patch}}} }}}}{{#if:{{{deckable|}}}|{{#set:Deckable={{{deckable}}} }}}}{{{keyword_annotations|}}}{{#set:LastModified={{CURRENTTIMESTAMP}} }}[[Category:Card]]{{#if:{{{element|}}}|[[Category:{{{element}}} cards]]}}{{#if:{{{type|}}}|[[Category:{{{type}}}s]]}}</includeonly>
